rationale: Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-2798; proactive spec-rollout for cluster time gossiping, not a prior nonconformance.
Use-after-free memory safety bug in URI parsing error path; no spec rule violated.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-2416; implementing OIDC Azure IdP, proactive spec-rollout not prior nonconformance.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-2601; implementing OIDC GCP IdP, proactive spec-rollout not prior nonconformance.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-2550; adding OIDC documentation examples, not a driver behavior fix.
Memory leak in error-path string appends; resource management bug with no specific contradicted spec rule.
Memory leak in GridFS bucket options on error; implementation bug with no spec rule violated.
Thin description; default timeout fix for Azure/GCP KMS requests; no spec rule cited.
Defensive workaround for server bugs SERVER-113344/113026; Java driver mentioned as prior art, not a cross-driver divergence.
Build system cleanup in Earthfile; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Removes spurious warning when TXT authSource is ignored after URI setter; UX improvement, no spec rule specifies warning behavior.
Improvement to omit empty CXX field from handshake; new behavior not previously required by spec.
CSOT spec states drivers must make good-faith effort to send killCursors after timeout; C driver deliberately skips this.
TLS stream timeout detection returning wrong boolean; internal implementation bug, no spec rule about timeout detection logic.
Change streams spec prohibits auto-resume after socket timeout; driver was incorrectly resuming. Bug + Issue split from DRIVERS-1404.
Fix to withTransaction sample code in docs; documentation correction, not a driver behavior bug.
Build/packaging fix: add -lm to pkg-config; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Regression: sessions spec requires gossiping $clusterTime in commands; first aggregate command omits it after 2.2.1 change.
SDAM spec: serverMonitoringMode=poll must use polling; driver incorrectly re-polls repeatedly when server supports streaming.
Explicitly 'Add spec test for server deprioritization'; issue split from DRIVERS-3380, test infrastructure addition.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3390; adding appName to OIDC test failpoints, test infrastructure update.
Bug fix in server deprioritization retry check; server selection spec defines deprioritization logic. Thin description.
HTTP response parsing security bug (CVE-218); no description, internal parsing safety issue, no spec rule.
Adding struct names to C types for better debuggability; internal header improvement, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3394; clarifying phase description in a spec test, test infrastructure documentation update.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-3411; proactive spec-rollout for transaction state preservation, not prior nonconformance.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-3397; new feature for Disaggregated Storage, proactive spec-rollout work.
Internal refactor making bson_t trivially relocatable; implementation improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
Security/arithmetic bug in legacy GridFS (CVE-231); integer overflow vulnerability, not a spec rule violation.
Improvement to use per-client handshake metadata; implementation architecture fix for correct telemetry reporting.
Explicitly: Java driver has socketKeepAlive option, C# lacks it; filed to add parity with Java driver.
Auth spec: GSSAPI/PLAIN credential source must be $external; driver incorrectly configures the database field.
Adding error category enum to WriteError for API ergonomics; no spec rule defines error categorization.
C#-specific LINQ/expression-tree bug losing BsonRepresentation through projection; language-binding issue not a BSON spec violation.
Empty description; tag-based server selection error; insufficient detail to identify spec rule violated.
MaxSize option silently ignored in legacy API wrapper; implementation bug in old-API compatibility layer.
Writing API documentation and reviewing member visibility; documentation task, no driver behavior change.
C#-specific expression tree bug losing type info on interface upcast; language-binding issue, no spec rule involved.
FilterDefinitionBuilder missing overloads for array vs scalar equality; C#-specific API completeness bug.
Internal refactor of IBsonStream interface for better abstraction; implementation improvement, no spec rule involved.
Internal refactor simplifying IByteBuffer interface; implementation improvement, no spec rule involved.
Reconnection failure after service restart in ASP.NET; implementation/lifecycle bug without specific spec rule cited.
NullReferenceException in FindFluent.CountAsync; implementation bug in fluent API, no spec rule involved.
GeoWithinBox builder generates invalid $box with only 2 coords instead of 4; API implementation bug, no driver spec defines geo query builders.
NullReferenceException in aggregation Unwind+Projection expression tree; C#-specific LINQ bug.
JsonWriter.Dispose() closes underlying TextWriter unlike other readers/writers; internal API inconsistency, no spec rule.
Improvement to allow BSON readers/writers to handle multiple documents; internal API ergonomics, no spec rule.
Adding X.509 authentication documentation; documentation task, no driver behavior change.
ObjectDisposedException in ClusterableServer.RequestHeartbeat; race condition in lifecycle management, no spec rule.
C#-specific expression tree bug: enum member field resolution fails; language-binding issue, no spec rule involved.
